## Summary

This section has a code block with heading-like lines.

```python
# This is a comment, not an H1
## Also not an H2
def hello():
    pass
```

Still part of Summary.

## Notes

Another section after the code block.

~~~bash
# Another comment inside tilde fence
echo "hello"
~~~
